scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend run test && npm --prefix backend run test
scripts.ci: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:test && npm run ci:build
